previous_campaign_summary: Cross-device D1 persistence (bookmarks, pins, reactions, edits), upload progress, export formats, mobile polish, search history, code splitting. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

objective_registry.user_value: Cross-device consistency for bookmarks, pins, reactions, edits

objective_registry.core_objective: Add progress tracking and file validation
objective_registry.user_value: Better feedback during uploads, ability to cancel

phases.scope: VideoWorkspace, video task polling, progress display
phases.user_visible_gain: Clearer video generation progress with elapsed time tracking
phases.before_after: Video progress is basic; no clear elapsed time
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added Timer icon, formatElapsed helper, and task-elapsed CSS class for elapsed time display during video generation

phases.scope: Lightbox component, keyboard handlers, focus management
phases.user_visible_gain: Navigate lightbox with arrow keys, Escape, Home/End, focus trap, ARIA support
phases.before_after: Lightbox only supported Escape and arrow keys; no Home/End, no focus trap, limited ARIA
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added Home/End key support, focus trap with Tab/Shift+Tab, auto-focus on mount, aria-live for counter, improved aria-label with position

phases.scope: ImageWorkspace, VideoWorkspace, result cards, preview rails
phases.user_visible_gain: Consistent result card design with unified ResultCard component
phases.before_after: Result cards had inconsistent layout and metadata display
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created unified ResultCard component used by ImageWorkspace. Video workspace keeps its own task-card layout for progress display.

phases.user_visible_gain: See image dimensions and video duration in asset cards
phases.before_after: Asset metadata shows only filename, kind, and size; no dimensions/duration
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added width, height, duration to AssetItem type. Created useAssetMetadata hook for client-side metadata extraction. Added AssetMeta component to display dimensions/duration in asset cards.

phases.scope: All components, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, color contrast
phases.user_visible_gain: Better accessibility for users with disabilities
phases.before_after: Modals lacked dialog role, Escape handler, focus trap; status badges failed AA contrast
phases.local_validation: 27 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added role=dialog, aria-modal, aria-labelledby, Escape handler, focus trap, body scroll lock to ExportModal and ConversationPickerModal. Fixed ResultCard keyboard handler. Improved task status badge color contrast for AA compliance.

phases.scope: New user flow, guided tour, tooltips, welcome screen
phases.user_visible_gain: New users understand how to use the app quickly
phases.before_after: No onboarding; new users are dropped into the app without guidance

phases.objective: Video progress persistence across tab switches
phases.scope: VideoWorkspace, video task state, D1 storage for active tasks
phases.user_visible_gain: Video progress persists when switching tabs or refreshing
phases.before_after: Video progress is lost when switching tabs

phases.user_visible_gain: Regenerate images with style reference from previous result
phases.before_after: Regeneration is basic; no style reference support

phases.scope: All interactive components, ARIA labels, keyboard shortcuts, focus indicators
phases.user_visible_gain: Full keyboard navigation, screen reader support, WCAG AA compliance
phases.before_after: Some interactive elements lack ARIA labels; focus indicators are inconsistent

phases.scope: All hooks, API functions, utility functions
phases.user_visible_gain: More reliable codebase with better test coverage
phases.before_after: Test coverage is limited to 6 test files; many hooks untested

phases.scope: Render performance, memory leaks, network efficiency, caching opportunities
phases.before_after: Some components may have render performance issues; no caching strategy

phases.scope: API client, error handling, retry logic, offline support
phases.user_visible_gain: App handles network failures gracefully with retry and offline detection
phases.before_after: Failed requests show errors but no automatic retry; offline state is basic

phases.user_visible_gain: Start conversations quickly with pre-built templates
phases.before_after: No templates; users must type their first message from scratch

phases.objective: Export to PDF with real rendering
phases.user_visible_gain: Export conversations as properly formatted PDFs
phases.before_after: PDF export uses browser print dialog; formatting is basic

phases.scope: Lightbox, AssetWorkspace, asset cards, preview interactions
phases.user_visible_gain: Smoother lightbox transitions, better asset grid hover effects
phases.before_after: Lightbox transitions are abrupt; asset grid hover is basic

phases.user_visible_gain: Save frequently used searches; advanced filter combinations
phases.before_after: Search is basic text match; no saved searches or advanced filters

phases.scope: Dead code, unused imports, type gaps, lint warnings, test coverage gaps
phases.before_after: Potential dead code and type gaps from rapid iteration

phases.scope: Overall polish, consistency, edge cases, final improvements
phases.before_after: Minor inconsistencies and polish opportunities remain
